seoTitle: Paramatta vs Parawa — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Paramatta and Parawa. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Paramatta and Parawa.
heading: Paramatta vs Parawa — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Paramatta, South Australia and Parawa, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Paramatta has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Parawa (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Paramatta or Parawa safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Paramatta has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Parawa scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Paramatta scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Parawa scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Paramatta or Parawa?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Paramatta has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
